_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: cell viability decreased in a dose- and time-dependent manner in response to Nutlin-3, which resulted in the accumulation of p53 in these cells with a maximum level at 10 μM for 48 h
details: Cell viability decreased in dose- and time-dependent manner with Nutlin-3, maximum p53 level at 10 μM for 48 h
